creator: 000.fbsd@quip.cz
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #1)
pkg audit works for base (kernel + world) for more than 6 years. It was originally created by Mark Felder. Then I created a port for periodic script https://www.freshports.org/security/base-audit/ which is now deleted as this functionality is included in pkg for about year.
https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-security/2016-August/009049.html

But Security Officer Team must publish SAs to VuXML. It will not work without entries in database.
I think this PR should be assigned to Security Team, because maintainer of ports-mgmt/pkg cannot do anything about it.
